Container.Name: kr8bit
Container.Overview: Self-hosted game library manager. Scans local installer folders, fetches Steam metadata + artwork, and lets you organize your library through a web UI. Kind of like Jellyfin for games.

Config.Name: Library Path
Config.Description: Folder with your .7z files or unpacked game folders (each containing setup.exe)

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Holds the SQLite DB and artwork cache

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: fatal | error | warn | info | debug | trace

Config.Name: Steam Index Refresh (hours)
Config.Description: How often to refresh the local Steam app list cache

Config.Name: Scan Max Depth
Config.Description: Directory depth when scanning library root (1 = flat scan)
